description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! This season, peep toe sandals and beaded thongs work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Heel: 3"Product DetailsBronze criss-crossing forefoot and midfoot straps which form a toe holderSoft footbed with a heel patchTough, textured wedge heelGrooved TPR outsoleMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
